description: CyberFusion SOC local integration program catalog. Runtime data and secrets remain outside source.

integrations.name: Wazuh host security evidence
integrations.mode: optional live health check plus offline/demo evidence import
integrations.safety: credentials from environment only; no real external sender

integrations.name: Zeek traffic metadata
integrations.safety: no packet capture or public target scan

integrations.name: Suricata IDS EVE events
integrations.safety: no IDS rule push or live traffic capture

integrations.name: Sigma detection rule reference
integrations.mode: rule metadata and detection-rule event import

integrations.name: Trivy vulnerability JSON
integrations.mode: offline JSON import into vulnerability center

integrations.name: MISP IOC evidence
integrations.safety: no real threat-intel pull without explicit environment config

integrations.name: ZAP baseline findings
integrations.safety: no full scan and no public target scan

integrations.name: CyberChef field analysis
integrations.safety: analysis helper only; no data exfiltration

integrations.name: Shuffle dry-run workflow examples
integrations.safety: dry-run log only; no real webhook/email/chat sender
